cp3_condition: Refine graph_spec representation values during broader coverage work.

candidate_future_values.reason: Producer exercises can require reading vertical distance between total revenue and total cost.
Welfare and intervention exercises may require identifying consumer surplus, producer surplus, deadweight loss, and government budget areas.
Minimum wage and labor-market equilibrium tasks use P-Q logic with wage/employment semantics.
Index-number exercises often appear as time-series or index tables and need distinction from raw value series.
External exam annex tables must be distinguished from values embedded directly in the prompt.

decision_rule: Do not expand the enum one exercise at a time during bulk backfill. Add representation values when a repeated class of exercises needs different validation, retrieval, or precision-lint behavior.
blocked_use: Do not use graph_spec as a complete operation registry; detailed operations remain provisional until Sprint 7, Sprint 12, or RX.5 work creates a governed registry.
